REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF CAT'S TAIL LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHIFTED THE BURDEN ON THE ISSUE OF BREACH. PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE OF BREACH IS ONE DECLARATION WITH CONCLUSORY STATEMENTS THAT THE DEFENDANTS "REFUSED" TO SIGN A LEASE, SELL A BUSINESS, LEASE A PROPERTY, AND HONOR A RIGHT OF FIRST REFUSAL. (SEE VALENTINE DECL. PARA. 15-16). THE COURT DENIES PLAINTIFF'S ORAL REQUEST TO FILE A SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312.
